'''Hogar''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who developed a technique to make the [[HR-211 Powersuit|HR-211]] [[Power armor/Legends|powersuit]] more comfortable. A side-effect of the powersuit was that it made the user uncomfortably warm. Hogar developed a technique to decrease the heat created by the suit by deflecting the heat with [[myoflex]]. Hogar's technique made the HR-211 a much more comfortable wear.

{{Char-stub}}
